channel.title: Specialty on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Specialty on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Greek Coffee? Briki Brewing, Sugar Levels & Greek Frappé Guide
item.description: Greek coffee is finely ground coffee boiled in a briki and served unfiltered with kaymaki foam. Learn the traditional briki technique, the four sugar levels (sketo to vary glykos), and how to make a Greek frappé.

item.title: What Is Yemeni Coffee? Origin, Qishr, Qahwa & Brewing Guide
item.description: Yemen is the birthplace of cultivated coffee. Learn authentic Yemeni coffee — Haraz beans, qahwa with cardamom and cinnamon, and qishr (caffeine-free coffee husk drink) — and how to brew it at home.
